MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:LUIS MOLINA FOR PLAINTIFF WAYNE MUFARREH ALSO PRESENT
DEFENDANT FRANK HOWARD JOHNSON IN PRO PER

SETLTLMENT CONFERENCE HELD. CASE SETTLED. TERMS PLACED ON RECORD.
STIPULATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AS FOLLOWS: POSSESSION AND RESTITUTION OF PREMISES TO PLAINTIFF. DEFENDANT WILL VACATE 475 FULTON #15, BY 5PM 12/17/04 AND RETURN KEYS TO BUILDING MANAGER.
THE LEASE IS FORFEITED. DEFENDANT WAIVES SECURITY DEPOSIT AND PLAINTIFF WAIVES ALL BACK RENT AND DAILY RENT. PLAINTIFF MAY DISPOSE OF ANY BELONGINGS LEFT BEHIND. DEFENDNAT AGREES NOT TO CAUSE ANY MALICIOUS DAMAGE. IF DEFENDANT COMPLIES PLAINTIFF WILL FILE A DISMISSAL WITH PREJUDICE. EACH PARTY TO BEAR OWN FEES AND COSTS. IF DEFENDANT BREACHES THE AGREEMENT PLAINTIFF ENTITLED TO POSSESSION AND ALL UNPAID RENT AND ATTORNEY FEES AND COSTS.
PLAINTIFF TO PREPARE WRITTEN STIPULATION.

JUDGE PRO TEM:IRVING PFEFFER;CLERK:BARBARA MORRIS; REPORTER:RHONDA AQUILINA (218)
